title: Term Deposit Predictor (Bank Marketing)
description: End-to-end ML pipeline to predict term deposit subscription using bank marketing data; trained, deployed, and tested. Includes Flask API and Container/Cloud deployment (Vertex AI/Cloud Run).

title: Sokal Bela — Bengali NLP Utilities
description: Lightweight Bengali language utilities and experiments—tokenization, text preprocessing, and basic ML/NLP workflows.

title: WBCS RAG Chatbot (Bengali + English)
description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation chatbot for WBCS prep using Vertex AI Embeddings + Vector Search + Gemini; bilingual Q&A workflow.
highlights: RAG pipeline with embeddings & vector store
Deployable with minimal infra on Vertex
